title: index out of range panic when setting tidb_opt_range_max_size small
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
```
use test;
CREATE TABLE `sbtest1` (
	`id` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
	`k` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
	`c` char(120) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
	`pad` char(60) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
	PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */ ,
	KEY `k_1` (`k`)
);
set @@tidb_opt_range_max_size = 111;
explain select * from test.sbtest1 a where pad in ('1','1','1','1','1') and id in (1,1,1,1,1);
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
Output the plan successfully. No panic happens.

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
```
mysql> explain select * from test.sbtest1 a where pad in ('1','1','1','1','1') and id in (1,1,1,1,1);
ERROR 1105 (HY000): runtime error: index out of range [0] with length 0
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE sbtest2 (id INTEGER NOT NULL, value TEXT DEFAULT NULL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (id));
INSERT INTO sbtest2 (id, value) VALUES (1, 'test1'), (2, 'test2'), (3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE sbtest3 (id INTEGER NOT NULL, amount REAL NOT NULL, description TEXT, PRIMARY KEY (id));
INSERT INTO sbtest3 (id, amount, description) VALUES (1, 100.00, 'first entry'), (2, 200.50, 'second entry');
SELECT * FROM sbtest2 WHERE value IS NULL OR id IN (SELECT id FROM sbtest3 WHERE amount > 150.00);
key_bug_features: setting tidb_opt_range_max_size to a small value
